title: OPINION: The power of small business: Shop local this holiday season
summary: As published in the Anchorage Daily News on Thursday, November 21, 2024 By Jon Bittner, Christi Bell, Radhika Krishna, Kathleen McArdle, Barbara Johnson, Alyssa Rodrigues and Jared Reynolds As the holiday season approaches, one day stands out for its potential to shape the future of our communities and economy: Small Business Saturday. Celebrated on the Saturday after Thanksgiving, this annual event offers more than an opportunity to check off items on your holiday shopping list — it’s a critical r...
